questions.question_text: Attempt both the parts 5*2 Explain the significance of job analysis in the hiring process. Provide an example of how job analysis can help a company ensure they hire the right candidate for a specific role "An investment in training today leads to excellence tomorrow." Comment

UNIT-1 “Manpower planning is essential for ensuring that an organization has the right people with the right skills at the right time” Discuss In a rapidly changing business environment, discuss the role of HRM in helping organizations adapt to changes and maintain a competitive edge with special emphasis on contemporary trends today

UNIT-2 How can organizations use career development programs to enhance employee retention while equipping them for future roles? Provide examples of effective strategies You are a newly appointed training manager at a retail company facing declining customer satisfaction scores. Design a training program for customer service representatives that focuses on improving customer interactions and issue resolution. Note: Q. 1 is compulsory.
